# Menon Medispa & Wellness

> Medical spa in Millburn, NJ offering aesthetic and wellness treatments including HydraFacial, Botox, dermal fillers, laser hair removal, microneedling, vein treatments, and IV therapy. Led by Dr. Aditi Menon, MD. Serving Millburn, Short Hills, Summit, Maplewood, Livingston, Springfield, and West Orange. Phone: (973) 494-8431.

## Start here
- [Home](https://www.menonmedispa.com/): Overview of Menon Medispa & Wellness in Millburn, NJ.
- [About](https://www.menonmedispa.com/about/): Our approach, philosophy, and story.
- [Meet the Team](https://www.menonmedispa.com/meet-the-team/): Dr. Aditi Menon and the care team.
- [Contact](https://www.menonmedispa.com/contact/): Address, hours, phone, and directions.
- [Book a Consultation](https://www.menonmedispa.com/consultation/): Complimentary skin consultations and treatment planning.
- [Request an Appointment](https://www.menonmedispa.com/request-appointment/): Online appointment request form.

## Face and skin
- [Face Treatments](https://www.menonmedispa.com/face/): Facials and aesthetic treatments for the face.
- [Facials](https://www.menonmedispa.com/menon-facials/): Signature and medical-grade facials.
- [HydraFacial](https://www.menonmedispa.com/hydrafacial/): HydraFacial skin resurfacing.
- [Microneedling](https://www.menonmedispa.com/microneedling-millburn-nj/): Collagen-induction microneedling with SkinPen.
- [Chemical Peel Facial](https://www.menonmedispa.com/chemical-peel-facial/): Exfoliating chemical peels.

## Injectables and body
- [Botox](https://www.menonmedispa.com/botox-millburn-nj/): Botox for wrinkles and fine lines.
- [Fillers and Injectables](https://www.menonmedispa.com/fillers-injectables/): Dermal fillers and injectable treatments.
- [Juvederm Fillers](https://www.menonmedispa.com/juvedermfillers/): Juvederm dermal fillers.
- [Laser Hair Removal](https://www.menonmedispa.com/laser-hair-removal/): Laser hair reduction.
- [Semaglutide Weight Loss](https://www.menonmedispa.com/semaglutide/): Medical weight-loss program.
- [Vein and Vascular Treatments](https://www.menonmedispa.com/vascular-treatments/): Dye-VL laser for spider veins and redness.

## Hair restoration
- [Hair Restoration](https://www.menonmedispa.com/hair/): Hair loss and restoration treatments.
- [PRP Hair Therapy](https://www.menonmedispa.com/platelet-rich-plasma-hair-millburn/): Platelet-rich plasma for hair.

## IV therapy and wellness
- [IV Therapy](https://www.menonmedispa.com/iv-therapy-millburn-nj/): Custom IV drips for energy, immunity, and recovery.
- [Vitamin Shots](https://www.menonmedispa.com/vitamin-shots-millburn-nj/): B12 and vitamin injections.
- [Memberships](https://www.menonmedispa.com/memberships/): Membership plans and perks.

## Resources
- [Blog](https://www.menonmedispa.com/blog/): Skincare, injectable, and wellness articles.
- [Find Your Glow Quiz](https://www.menonmedispa.com/find-your-glow/): Personalized treatment and skincare-routine finder.
